# clang trunk: assertion "isSimple()" in LValue::getPointer during codegen of inline asm operand on bit-field member

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173679
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, crash, inline-asm, generated by fuzzer

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/9Gj1f313c

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Console
```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/CodeGen/CGPointerAuth.cpp:753: llvm::Value* clang::CodeGen::LValue::getPointer(clang::CodeGen::CodeGenFunction&) const: Assertion `isSimple()' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

## Code
```c
struct CombinedStruct_1 {
int a : 31;
};
struct CombinedStruct_1 combinedVar_1;
void foo(void) {
  int a;
  asm("nop"
      :
      : "m"((int)(combinedVar_1.a))); 
  asm("nop"
      : "=r"((unsigned)combinedVar_1.a)); 
}
```

## Code
```c
struct CombinedStruct_1 {
int a : 31;
};
struct CombinedStruct_1 combinedVar_1;
void foo(void) {
  int a;
  asm("nop"
      :
      : "m"((int)(combinedVar_1.a))); 
  asm("nop"
      : "=r"((unsigned)combinedVar_1.a)); 
}
```
</details>


---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Further reduction:
```cpp
struct C {
    int a : 31;
} c;
void foo(void) { asm("" : : "m"((int)(c.a))); }
```
Does not occur without the cast.

Asserts on invalid since Clang 20: https://godbolt.org/z/scnj5od3j

---
